description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on every push to the main branch and on pull requests to the main branch. Use an ubuntu-24.04 job with read permissions for actions and repository contents, and write permission for security events. Perform a matrix analysis for the cpp language, checking out the repository with submodules, initializing CodeQL, installing dependencies, building the project with CMake and Ninja, and then running a CodeQL analysis.
